contenders.handicapper_notes: Redente gelding making his debut. Showed good early speed to win a Halidon trial over 1000m on July 16. The wide draw is of minimal concern on this spacious track, making him a highly competitive first-start option.
Magnus gelding who struggled on debut, finishing 9th of 13 over this track and distance on a heavy surface. Hard to recommend until he shows some positive track form.
Star Turn gelding debuting after six trials. Finished a close second to Noah's Ark in his latest trial at Halidon. Keep safe in the market despite the awkward draw.

Excellent first-up effort when finishing 3rd over 1200m here on July 7. Fitter now and boasts strong second-up stats (including a close second at Balaklava last prep). The long straight plays perfectly to his closing style.
Resumed with a mediocre 6th over 900m on a heavy track here. Historically struggles second-up and looks tested in this field.
Showed good speed to lead and finish second over 1100m here on July 17. While she is a key contender, the punishing 450m straight at Gifford Hill poses a stamina risk for this front-runner.
Beaten 12 lengths at Mt Gambier last start on a heavy track. Faded quickly after racing on the pace and needs to show significant improvement.
Strong second-up performance when third at Balaklava over 1200m. Fitter now and gets a highly favorable draw to secure a soft run behind the speed.
Finished 7th at Morphettville first-up over 1050m. Entitled to improve significantly second-up and handles soft conditions well.
Hanseatic filly debuting after five trials. Wide draw is not a major issue here, but she may need the run against experienced rivals.

contenders.handicapper_notes: Narrowly missed last start when second over 1400m here on July 7. Boasts excellent consistency at this distance and is the clear horse to beat.
Finished a solid third behind Paganini here on July 7. Tends to race on the speed and will try to steal it, but the long straight will test his late resolve.
Made good late ground to finish 4th over 1600m at Morphettville on July 8. Dropping back to 1400m is ideal, and his swooping style is perfectly suited to Gifford Hill.
Disappointed on debut when fifth over 1400m here as a well-supported favorite. Capable of showing sharp improvement with that experience under his belt.
Finished 7th on debut over 1200m here. Steps up to 1400m now, which should suit, but needs to find a few lengths to threaten.
Finished 5th on a heavy track at Mt Gambier last start. Has struggled to break through in 17 starts and is best watched for now.
Beaten 11 lengths at Morphettville Parks first-up. Hard to recommend on recent form.
Solid third over 1200m here on July 4. Gets a great barrier and should be prominent throughout. Strong place chance.
Struggled in both career starts to date, including a 14-length defeat here last start. Looks outclassed.
Finished 5th over 1200m here last start. Needs to show more to feature in this 1400m contest.
Consistent type who finished third at Port Augusta last start. Has run well on turf previously and must be respected.
Beaten 10 lengths first-up at Morphettville Parks. Hard to see him threatening here.
